svg.text: Combined Architecture — Core Zone + JSZ Zone
Core Zone (K8s): Control Plane + Data Plane | MySQL + Elasticsearch (External to K8s) | Firewall | JSZ Zone (VM): Gateway + Redis
CORE ZONE — Single Zone Deployment (All Components Internal)
DATA PLANE — Internal API Gateway (K8s Cluster)
TLS 1.2/1.3 | mTLS | JWT Validation | Rate Limiting | IP Filtering
Policies: Transform | Cache | Quota | Circuit Breaker | Logging
Analytics Collection | Request/Response Logging | Metrics Export
Redis co-located in each Gateway Cluster — NOT in Control Plane
NTP :123 | DNS :53 | LDAP :636 | SMTP :25 | PKI/CA | K8s :6443
RBAC: Group Permissions | Sharding Tags | Environment Separation
Elasticsearch Cluster (Core Zone — External to K8s)
Analytics | Logs | Metrics | :9200 | 3 nodes | REST API
MySQL Cluster (Core Zone — External to K8s)
API Definitions | Plans | Subscriptions | Users | Audit Logs | TLS | InnoDB Cluster
JSZ ZONE — Japan Security Zone (VM-Based API Gateway)
SECURE CONTENT PROVIDER (SCP) — VM-Based API Gateway
TLS 1.2/1.3 | mTLS | JWT Validation | OAuth 2.0 | IP Filtering
Policies: Transform | Cache | Circuit Breaker | Mock | Logging
Rate Limiting | Caching | Session Store | TLS :6379
Pull API Configs from MySQL (Core Zone :3306) | Push Analytics to Elasticsearch (Core Zone :9200)
Analytics events filtered — NO PII/MNPI data leaves JSZ Zone
PII / MNPI DATA ZONE — Sensitive Data Remains in JSZ Only
Customer PII | Financial MNPI | Compliance Data
User Authentication: Corporate Users — OpenAM SSO (OAuth 2.0 / OIDC)
API Request: Consumer Apps — Global Load Balancer — Regional Gateways
Config Management: Control Plane — MySQL (external) for API definitions, plans, subscriptions
Backend Routing: Gateway — Backend Services (mTLS/TLS) within Core Zone
API Request: JSZ Consumers — Load Balancer — Gateway Nodes (HTTPS :443)
Config Sync: JSZ Gateway pulls API configs from MySQL (Core Zone) — Through Firewall :3306
Analytics: JSZ Gateway pushes events to Elasticsearch (Core Zone) — Through Firewall :9200
JSZ Backend: Gateway routes to local backends within JSZ (no firewall) — PII/MNPI stays in JSZ
v1.4 | Combined Architecture | Core Zone (K8s) + JSZ Zone (VM) | SCP + SDP | MySQL + ES External to K8s
